label: Vanehouse Sleeper Cell
description: Vanehouse Sleeper Cell is a compact berth compartment recessed off Vanehouse Passage, sealed by a gasketed hatch to preserve the corridor’s dry, ozonated air and dust discipline. Matte black bulkheads are scored with copper-white heading bands that fall through a narrow prism-slit, laying fixed light lines across the bunk and stowage faces. A ribbed sleeping recess and strap-down lockerwork are integrated into the structure, with grounded conductor-strip trims tying the room into the Prismwake’s discharge network. A shallow catch-tray threshold and micro-drain lead to a sealed scupper cistern, ensuring glass-dust falloff never migrates back into the passage.
